title: Discrete Probability Distributions
description: Master PMF and CDF for discrete random variables.

lessons.title: PMF Definition
lessons.content:
## PMF Definition

Probability Mass Function gives P(X=x) for each value x.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Properties of PMF
lessons.content:
## Properties of PMF

All probabilities are non-negative and sum to 1.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Calculating from PMF
lessons.content:
## Calculating from PMF

Find probabilities of events using the PMF.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: CDF Definition
lessons.content:
## CDF Definition

Cumulative Distribution Function: F(x) = P(X ≤ x).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: PMF and CDF Relationship
lessons.content:
## PMF and CDF Relationship

CDF is the running sum of PMF values.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.
